def raise_for_status(self) -> None: if not self.ok: # reason should always be not None for a started response assert self.reason is not None self.release() > raise ClientResponseError( self.request_info, self.history, status=self.status, message=self.reason, headers=self.headers, ) E aiohttp.client_exceptions.ClientResponseError: 401, message='Unauthorized', url=URL('https://hacker-news.firebaseio.com/v0/items/8863.json')
